taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, DevOps, DevOps Engineer
core_skills: DevOps, Infrastructure, Site Reliability Engineering, Log Analysis, Metrics Analysis
skill_match_scores: DevOps:1.0, Infrastructure:0.0, Site Reliability Engineering:0.0, Log Analysis:0.5, Metrics Analysis:0.0
must_have_quals: Hands-on experience in DevOps, Infrastructure, or Site Reliability Engineering roles, Ability to analyze and interpret logs, metrics, and monitoring data to troubleshoot issues, Familiarity with the software development lifecycle and deployment practices, Understanding of microservices architecture and RESTful APIs, Comfortable working in Agile/Scrum environments, Ability to create and maintain basic automation or scripting (e.g., Python, Bash), Experience working with SQL for querying and reporting, Good communication and collaboration skills
preferred_quals: Exposure to infrastructure as code (e.g., Terraform, CloudFormation), Experience supporting CI/CD pipelines, Familiarity with incident management and service-level objectives (SLOs), Experience supporting cloud-based and hybrid environments
core_responsibilities: Collaborate with engineering teams to promote SRE practices across the organization, Create and maintain operational documentation such as runbooks and playbooks, Configure and maintain monitoring and alerting tools related to the applications, Monitor application and infrastructure health and recommend improvements to performance and reliability, Identify manual tasks and contribute to automation efforts, Work with developers and QA teams to support non-functional requirements like performance and availability, Assist in triaging and resolving production issues and incidents, Participate in incident response and post-incident reviews, Join product team ceremonies (e.g., stand-ups) as needed for alignment and support
job_summary: CCC Intelligent Solutions Inc. is a leading cloud platform for the insurance economy, creating intelligent experiences for various stakeholders. The Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) will work closely with the Product Development team to ensure the reliability, performance, and availability of applications, emphasizing incident response, monitoring, automation, and collaboration.
